requirement_topic.zh: 土耳其 50 Hz 230/400 V 电网配置
requirement_topic.zht: 土耳其 50 Hz 230/400 V 電網配置

summary.en: Solar PV inverter models for Turkey should be configured and documented for the local 50 Hz low-voltage grid profile, commonly 230 V phase-to-neutral and 400 V phase-to-phase for three-phase systems, while actual protection thresholds and permissible ranges are governed by the Turkish project, distribution company, and applicable grid rules.
summary.zh: 用于土耳其的太阳能光伏逆变器型号应按当地 50 Hz 低压电网配置进行设置和文件化，三相系统通常为相对中性线 230 V、相间 400 V；实际保护阈值和允许范围由土耳其项目、配电公司及适用电网规则决定。
summary.zht: 用於土耳其的太陽能光伏逆變器型號應按當地 50 Hz 低壓電網配置進行設定和文件化，三相系統通常為相對中性線 230 V、相間 400 V；實際保護閾值和允許範圍由土耳其專案、配電公司及適用電網規則決定。

standards_or_laws: EN 50160 voltage characteristics of electricity supplied by public distribution networks

summary.en: China inverter defaults are commonly built around China 50 Hz grid operation and China grid-code profiles, including GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964-2024 evidence. The common frequency does not eliminate the need to check Turkey-specific voltage windows, protection parameters, neutral/earthing assumptions, and project commissioning settings.
summary.zh: 中国逆变器默认配置通常围绕中国 50 Hz 电网运行及中国并网规范，包括 GB/T 37408 和 GB/T 19964-2024 证据。频率相同并不免除核查土耳其特定电压窗口、保护参数、中性点/接地假设及项目投运设置。
summary.zht: 中國逆變器預設配置通常圍繞中國 50 Hz 電網運行及中國併網規範，包括 GB/T 37408 和 GB/T 19964-2024 證據。頻率相同並不免除核查土耳其特定電壓窗口、保護參數、中性點／接地假設及專案投運設定。

gap.en: The gap is not nominal frequency alone; it is the complete country profile. Exporters should provide Turkey grid-code parameter sets, allowable voltage/frequency ranges, over/under-voltage and over/under-frequency settings, reconnection delays, power-factor/reactive-power controls, and commissioning evidence for each firmware version.
gap.zh: 差距不只是标称频率，而是完整国家配置。出口商应提供土耳其电网规范参数集、允许电压/频率范围、过/欠压和过/欠频设置、重连延时、功率因数/无功控制，以及每个固件版本的投运证据。
gap.zht: 差距不只是標稱頻率，而是完整國家配置。出口商應提供土耳其電網規範參數集、允許電壓／頻率範圍、過／欠壓和過／欠頻設定、重連延時、功率因數／無功控制，以及每個韌體版本的投運證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where grid connection or project commissioning requires Turkish voltage/frequency settings; nominal IEC/EN voltage standards are technical baselines, not standalone market authorization
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China 50 Hz settings do not automatically satisfy Turkish voltage/frequency and protection settings

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Even though China and Turkey are both 50 Hz markets, Turkish 230/400 V profiles and project protection settings should be loaded, locked, and evidenced before energization.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 即使中国和土耳其均为 50 Hz 市场，也应在送电前加载、锁定并证明土耳其 230/400 V 配置和项目保护参数。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 即使中國和土耳其均為 50 Hz 市場，也應在送電前載入、鎖定並證明土耳其 230/400 V 配置和專案保護參數。
